'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 dark:bg-yellow-900 dark:text-yellow-200' : row.status === 'review' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 dark:bg-blue-900 dark:text-blue-200' : row.status === 'rejected' ? 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800 dark:bg-purple-900 dark:text-purple-200' : row.status === 'suspended' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800 dark:bg-red-900 dark:text-red-200' : row.status === 'deleted' ? inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium {{row.target_status === 'published' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800 dark:bg-green-900 dark:text-green-200' : row.target_status === 'blinded' ? 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800 dark:bg-orange-900 dark:text-orange-200' : row.target_status === 'deleted' ? 'bg-gray-600 text-white dark:bg-gray-600 dark:text-gray-100' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 dark:bg-gray-700 dark:text-gray-200'}}
